'''P2-D19''' was a [[P2-series astromech droid|P2-series]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] produced by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was considered outdated as of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

P2-D19 was stationed aboard the ''[[Black Ice/Legends|Black Ice]]'', where [[Skolos]] programmed the droid to attack a team of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] agents who were attempting to overtake the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] supply ship.

==Appearances==
*[[Black Ice (adventure)|''Black Ice'']]
